prompt: A high-end editorial fashion photograph shown as an open large-format hardcover magazine or art book lying flat on a clean off-white surface, viewed from directly above. The two-page spread contains 2 full-page portraits of the same elegant woman with her face obscured by a soft square blur, creating a privacy-censored look. On the left page, she stands against a pale stone or concrete architectural wall wearing a structured long-sleeve dress in soft slate gray, with a fitted bodice, round neckline, sharply tailored seams, and an exaggerated sculptural bell-shaped skirt; the camera angle is slightly low, making her neck appear long and her posture statuesque. On the right page, she is photographed from the back in a dramatic black evening gown with a very deep open back, wide shoulder straps, and a voluminous full skirt, standing in front of a classic paneled wall or door in a dim, moody interior. Use luxury fashion magazine styling, minimal composition, muted tones, soft natural-looking light, refined shadows, realistic paper texture, visible book gutter, slightly curved pages, and crisp print detail. The overall mood is sophisticated, couture, cinematic, and understated, like a premium fashion editorial spread.
